recommendations.title: Revenge of the Creature
recommendations.overview: In a tributary of the Amazon, a monster – half-man, half-fish – is captured and placed in a reservoir in a Florida national park to be observed by scientists.

recommendations.title: This Island Earth
recommendations.overview: Aliens have landed and are hiding on Earth, but need Earth’s scientists to help them fight an inter-planetary war.

recommendations.title: The Incredible Shrinking Man
recommendations.overview: A dangerous combination of radiation and insecticide causes the unfortunate Scott Carey to shrink, slowly but surely, until he is only a few inches tall. His home becomes a wilderness where he must survive everything from spiders living in the cellar

recommendations.title: Tarantula

recommendations.title: It Came from Outer Space

recommendations.title: The Mouse That Roared

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Aguirre, the Wrath of God
recommendations.overview: A few decades after the destruction of the Inca Empire, a Spanish expedition led by the infamous Aguirre leaves the mountains of Peru and goes down the Amazon River in search of the lost city of El Dorado. When great difficulties arise, Aguirre’s men

recommendations.title: Embrace of the Serpent
recommendations.overview: The epic story of the first contact, encounter, approach, betrayal and, eventually, life-transcending friendship, between Karamakate, an Amazonian shaman, last survivor of his people, and two scientists that, over the course of 40 years, travel throu

recommendations.title: April and the Extraordinary World
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: It's 1941, but France is trapped in the 19th Century, governed by steam and Napoleon V. Avril, a teenage girl, goes in search of her missing scientist parents.
